text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! The perfect drink after a perfect<n>patrol!
Excellent choice, me!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Nothing beats a sports drink after<n>sweating
a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You know, I didn't know your Bakushin<n>Patrols
were so long! You just kept<n>going and going! It
was so cool!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
For my patrol to truly protect the<n>student body, it
must last twenty-four<n>seven, three hundred
sixty-five days a<n>year!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Why me, you might ask? Because it is my<n>duty as
a genius to protect the peace!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Does that mean... you're the school's<n>hero?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Class representative by day, school hero<n>by
night... The Masked Representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I LIKE IT! The perfect title for one such<n>as I!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am the Masked<n>Representative—Bakushin Red!
And in<n>order to eradicate evil... I shall do<n>another
patrol! BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaaa! Lemme help, Bakushin Red!<n>Special
Move: Super Patrol Daaash!
